_description: Performance intelligence layer. Tracks how templates/headlines/keywords perform across the portfolio. Updated during monthly audits. Informs template selection for new campaigns.
_methodology: V1 is manual: agent reads performance data during audits and updates this file. Structure ready for automated pipeline later.

cantina_pe_search.campaign_name: Jay St. | Underdogs Cantina Private Events

converting_search_terms.term: restaurants with private rooms san francisco

top_descriptions_by_impressions: Host unforgettable private events at Underdogs Cantina. Custom menus, dedicated space, full bar.
Private dining rooms in Inner Sunset. Perfect for corporate events, birthdays & celebrations.

summary.root_cause: No negative keywords, exact match only, wrong search intent

anti_patterns.result: Zero clicks in 54 days on 15 exact keywords
anti_patterns.lesson: Always use PHRASE match for PE keywords
Apply base negatives BEFORE enabling campaign
PRESENCE only, never area of interest

cantina_foot_traffic_pmax.notes: Strong foot traffic driver. Asset groups for general food + sports worked well. Happy hour asset group underperformed.

template_performance._description: Aggregated performance by template. Updated during audits. Keys match copy-templates.json entries.

cross_portfolio_insights._description: Patterns observed across multiple clients. Added during audits.

insights.insight: PHRASE match dramatically outperforms EXACT for PE keywords
insights.evidence: Cantina (phrase) = 25 PE leads. Tres (exact) = 0 leads. Same market, same period.

insights.insight: Presence-only targeting eliminates 25-30% wasted spend in metro areas
insights.evidence: Tres had 28% out-of-area spend before fix. Common pattern in SF campaigns.

insights.insight: PE PMax without audience signals leaks 30%+ to general food queries
insights.evidence: Cantina PE PMax search term analysis showed food queries without PE intent

insights.insight: Base negative keywords should be applied BEFORE campaign goes live
insights.evidence: Every campaign without day-1 negatives accumulates wasted spend in first 2 weeks
